title: Group-3 CatBoost with turbine-location and hub-height physical features
rationale: The selected group-3 blend gives CatBoost almost all weight but only evaluates its base feature surface; group-specific IDW and hub-height features were evaluated with LightGBM, not the short-history-friendly CatBoost branch.
expected_signal: The physical feature branch must beat an otherwise identical base-control CatBoost and the exact current H2 surface with positive FICR, stable seeds, at least four positive months, and a positive bootstrap lower tail.
risk_notes: A full replacement changes nearly every row and is diagnostic only; any candidate must be a separately validated bounded child ensemble.
